Confirmation Email Follow-up for Freebie - Brick & Mortar                         Copyright Free Template


SUBJECT:  Thank You For Claiming [Insert Freebie]!

Hi (First Name), 

Congratulations. Thank you for taking action and claiming
your FREE [Insert Product/Service/Report]. 
 
You'll be able to immediately [insert problem your freebie
is going to solve] so you can sleep better at night 
knowing [future-pace the prospect what life will be 
like when the problem is solved].

You can access [insert link to irresistible offer, such as 
a free gift or report here. If they're coming into the store
to claim a free gift, give directions to the store and hours]. 


(Insert Link)


Thanks, and we'll see you in [Insert Store] soon! 


(Insert Name)


P.S. We challenge you to find another store in [location] that
[insert characteristic that makes you unique in your area]. 

We know you'll be back to visit us again and again, which 
is why we're offering this FREE [Gift/Report/Service].
